---
title: "Manuscript Title"
author: "Author Names, Degrees"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  word_document:
    reference_docx: reference.docx
---

# Key Points

**Question:** [One focused clinical question.]

**Findings:** [One to two sentences with design, population, and principal finding.]

**Meaning:** [One sentence with clinical implication.]

# Abstract

**Importance:** [Text]

**Objective:** [Text]

**Design:** [Text]

**Setting:** [Text]

**Participants:** [Text]

**Exposures:** [Text]

**Main Outcomes and Measures:** [Text]

**Results:** [Text]

**Conclusions and Relevance:** [Text]

# Introduction

[Text]

# Methods

[Text]

# Results

[Text]

# Discussion

[Text]

# References

1. Author AB, Author CD. Article title. Journal. Year;volume(issue):pages.
